content.en:
A long time has passed.

With the help of the resources of the Ancient Star Clan and the guidance of the Star Ancestor, Ye Tian's cultivation improved very quickly, and now he was close to the realm of the Double Supreme One.

It is very difficult for the Supreme One to break through every realm, and without sufficient potential, resources, and opportunities, it is very difficult to break the shackles and advance to the next realm.

Even if Ye Tian's talent is very demonic, it is not easy to be promoted to a double supreme.

Xingzu didn't want to wait for the descent slowly, so he spent a little strength and forcibly sent out a treasure - the Origin Liquid!

This is a kind of cultivation resource that existed at the beginning of the source sea, which can increase the probability of the supreme being almost 100%, but it is only of great help to the supreme below the quadruple, and for the supreme above the quadruple, the help is not too great, at most it can increase the probability of breakthrough by one or two percent.

After Xingzu spent the price to send out some primordial source liquid, the consciousness left in the ancient star tower was a little blurred, he looked at Ye Tian and admonished: "Xu Chen, these are primordial source liquids, which can help you break the shackles and be promoted to the Quadruple Supreme Realm, it can always help you break through to the Quadruple Supreme realm, and when you break through to the Quadruple Supreme realm, it will not be of much help, but when the time comes, I will help you to ascend to the Quadruple and Sixfold Supreme Realm faster." "

Xu Chen, that is, Ye Tian, took the primordial source liquid, and his heart was also quite shocked.

He didn't expect that there was such a treasure as the Primordial Source Liquid, and if it was passed on, he was afraid that it would cause the greed and competition of countless supreme beings.

But are there any drawbacks to taking Primordial Solution?

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian asked the machine spirit: "Machine spirit, do you know the original source liquid?"

The machine spirit immediately replied: "Master, the primordial source liquid is a resource that appeared at the beginning of the source sea, it is very rare, and now it no longer exists, only some ancient supreme beings have the primordial source liquid, it can help the supreme below the fourth level to break the shackles and improve the realm, but it has some flaws, mainly if you encounter the primordial source liquid, it is best not to take it, but choose to trade it." "

"What kind of flaw?"

Ye Tian asked with some curiosity.

The machine spirit said truthfully: "The only drawback of the Primordial Source Liquid is that it will consume the potential of the Supreme One, which is usually not visible, but once you cultivate to the peak realm of the Nine Folds Supreme One, it is difficult to cross that half a step. Once, many ancient and powerful Supreme Beings had just taken too much Primordial Source Liquid, and although their cultivation to the realm was very fast, when they cultivated to the peak realm of the Ninefold Supreme One, no matter how amazing their combat power was, they could even compete with the existence of the Half-Step Transcending Supreme One, but they still couldn't break through. Eventually, the Supreme Beings learned that the Primordial Source Liquid had this defect. Of course, many Supreme Beings will never be able to break through to the Ninefold Supreme Realm, and they don't care about this flaw. Therefore, many Supreme Beings still have a great desire for the Primordial Source Liquid. But you are different masters, you will definitely be able to easily reach the realm of the Nine Folds Supreme in the future, and even have the hope of surpassing the previous master, so you can't take the original source liquid!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian was completely enlightened.

Xingzu is cheating on him, Xingzu used to be a powerhouse who used the primordial source liquid to break through to the realm of the Ninefold Supreme, so he has been trapped in this realm.

Now, if he wants to get out of trouble, he quickly improves him, and he doesn't care about his potential, and he doesn't even want him to surpass himself.

For Xingzu, as long as he is allowed to get out of trouble as soon as possible, what is the potential of sacrificing a descendant clan?

"It's a pity, Xingzu, you underestimated me, I'm just a copy body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Since it was a copy of the body, Ye Tian naturally didn't care about the potential.

Since the Star Ancestor gave him the Origin Source Liquid, then he should use it and improve his strength as soon as possible, so that he would have enough strength to sweep the Ancient Star Clan.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the Primordial Source Liquid to start impacting the Dual Supreme Realm, and as a result, he easily broke the shackles.

After cultivating to break through to the realm of the Double Supreme, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and now he was afraid that he would be able to defeat the top ten supreme beings of the Ancient Star Clan with his hands.

However, Ye Tian did not do it immediately, but continued to cultivate.

Anyway, the potential of this body had already been consumed, so he collected all kinds of consumption potential and forbidden techniques to improve his strength, coupled with the various resources of the Ancient Star Clan, in just a few Great Tribulation Periods, he raised his cultivation to the peak of the Double Supreme One, and then used the Primordial Source Liquid again to break through the realm.

In this way, Ye Tian broke through to the realm of the Triple Supreme.

It would be more difficult to break through from the Triple Supreme Realm to the Fourth Supreme Realm, so Ye Tian was not prepared to delay.

With his current strength, it would not be difficult at all to kill the Ten Supreme Beings of the Ancient Star Clan.

this day.

Ye Tian summoned the Ten Supreme Beings of the Ancient Star Clan and invited them to a meeting.

For Ye Tian's invitation, the top ten supreme beings of the Ancient Star Clan naturally did not fail to give face, and they all came to Ye Tian's palace one by one.

"Xuchen, do you have anything to do with us?"

Donghe asked.

Seeing the ten supreme beings arriving one by one and sitting down, Ye Tian suddenly opened the formation, and urged one of the ancient star clan's Zhen clan source weapons, Zhenkong Xinghe!

This is a top-notch source weapon that seals time and space, and it can seal this place, so that the Ten Supreme Beings have no way to escape.

Donghe saw that Ye Tian had blocked time and space, and he was immediately furious: "Xu Chen, what do you mean by this?"

"The Ancient Star Clan will be under my control, and you don't need to exist anymore!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Immediately, the aura of the Triple Supreme on Ye Tian's body erupted.

Compared to Ye Tian, the Ten Supreme Beings were simply like ants, they were simply too weak.

"Xu Chen, if you do this, aren't you afraid of the ancestor?" Gu Shen moved out of the Star Ancestor.

"What do you mean Xing Ancestor?" Ye Tian sneered: "He still expects me to save him, but I won't save him, he will be suppressed for the rest of his life!"

"You're crazy, Ancestor comes out, we can also break away from the Star Ancient Domain and stay in the Star Ancient Domain for the rest of our lives, and you won't be able to ascend to a higher realm!" Donghe roared.

"No, I don't care about that!"

Ye Tian said.

When the top ten supreme beings saw that they couldn't move Ye Tian, they shot together, they couldn't sit still.

And Ye Tian stopped talking nonsense and started directly.

As soon as they made a move, they found out how powerful Ye Tian was, a powerful supreme skill was used due to instinct, and his combat experience was many times richer than all of them.

Moreover, every blow from Ye Tian was enough to severely damage them.

Soon, a supreme being was killed by Ye Tian.
